description: A container is discharged from one vessel and will be loaded onto another vessel at the same terminal without leaving the port.

nodes.task_description: The TOS identifies a container on a discharge list as 'Transhipment' based on its documentation.

expected_outcome.expected: The system automatically flags the container as a transhipment move.

nodes.task_description: Assign the container to a specific transhipment block in the yard to keep it separate from local imports.

expected_outcome.expected: The yard plan assigns the container to a location in the transhipment zone.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the container is not made available for truck pickup and is automatically added to the load list for the connecting vessel.

expected_outcome.expected: The system correctly manages the container's status, preventing an erroneous gate move and ensuring it's planned for the next vessel.
